stemHtml: An aircraft flying an IFR flight is being vectored. The vectors received take the aircraft off an ATS route. The controller of the (1) _____ unit issues clearances such that the prescribed obstacle clearance (2) _____, until the aircraft is cleared to resume own navigation.

options.a: (1) Flight Information Service; (2) is NOT assured.
options.b: (1) Flight Information Service; (2) will exist at all times.
options.c: (1) Air Traffic Control; (2) is NOT assured.
options.d: (1) Air Traffic Control; (2) will exist at all times.
